name: Rotated Text Dataset
description: Text samples that are commonly rotated or skewed in scanned documents.

pages.ground_truth: This text is rotated 90 degrees clockwise. It simulates a landscape page scan with sideways text.
This text is rotated 180 degrees. It simulates an upside-down document scan.
Slightly skewed text at a 5-degree angle. Common in flatbed scanner outputs.
